## Release: Merge `develop` → `main`

This PR merges the latest changes from `develop` into `main` for release.

### ✅ Pre-Release Checklist

- [ ] All CI checks passing
- [ ] E2E tests against staging passing
- [ ] All target features/fixes tested in `develop`
- [ ] Convetional commits in changelog reviewed
- [ ] Version bump appropriate for changes
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if applicable)
